meta.description: Triggered by VNTANA webhook (or manually) with a product UUID. Downloads the product GLB, parses its scene tree, stores the raw tree as a JSON attachment, and responds with a link to the parts-mapper UI. If a mapping attachment already exists from a prior run it is included so the mapper can show confirmed vs new nodes.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Scene tree extracted and stored', productUuid: $node['Build Notification'].json.productUuid, productName: $node['Build Notification'].json.productName, totalMeshes: $node['Build Notification'].json.mapping.totalMeshes, needsRename: $node['Build Notification'].json.mapping.needsRename, mapperUrl: $node['Build Notification'].json.mapperUrl }) }}
